title: Pugmeowla's: A Transformation Among Us
description: A "humerous" mod that adds Poluseans as a transformation to the Alien Evo Omnitrix
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e16c44b7d2b4016f9d4345305008ce92d4777642.png)

### Pugmeowla's: A Transformation Among Us:
is an Addon to Alien Evolution that adds Poluseans (Imposters) as a transformation for Minecraft 1.20.1.

The goal to this addon is to add the imposter from Among Us as accurately as possible, mostly through geckolib animations. All aspects of this addon are created to be faithful and accurate, yet balanced and integrated to expand to the Omnitrix's arsenal of aliens. Expect updates adding new features and structures as I continue development on this project.

**Join the discord server! Become a part of the community and view early teasers, ask questions, and suggest features!**

## Meet The Team!

[![pugmeowla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/891a2035f50e27ecfc4632ac2ab24ba1d5bddc29.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Pugmeowla) **Developer**

[![spartan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27017ca8ff9d10bf5b737259c2b9e8bb1c2e111a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/SpartanGamezFTB) **Assets**

![segment_sa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3c3036461881307603b9754ec2fdd9b4f0e8c9.png)

To get this alien, it requires mistransformation at the moment, until the propper way is fully developed

Ability 1 - Kill with tongue ![alt text](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1473462057046118592/1474999992912449657/polusean2.gif?ex=699be44a&is=699a92ca&hm=73d850b0865d35fce4910bf2927b1462fd15d09cd2ba757f41e3772a66b55be0&=&width=1053&height=595)

Ability 2 - Kill with Knife ![alt text](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1473462057046118592/1475000897204654302/polusean3.gif?ex=699be522&is=699a93a2&hm=528f4a4de1c41673b691c24f91541e427af4335574e3ae06c97bbf7e18abdd5d&=&width=471&height=627)
